_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for Aligned continuity — Prime, WFC/FOC, Rescue Bots, RiD 2015

data.name: Optimus Prime (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Heavily armored Cybertronian robot with angular blue and red plating and glowing blue optics. Transforms into a bulky Cybertronian truck with no Earth disguise, featuring exposed mechanical detailing and alien geometry

data.name: Optimus Prime (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Sleek, angular CGI design with deep red and blue armor, sharp edges, and glowing blue eyes. Tall and heroic proportions with a silver faceplate. Transforms into an Earth-style long-nose Peterbilt semi-truck cab

data.name: Bumblebee (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Compact yellow Cybertronian robot with black accents and glowing blue optics. Transforms into a sleek alien sports car with Cybertronian styling and no Earth-based vehicle cues

data.name: Bumblebee (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Sleek yellow and black robot with door-wing panels on his back, angular CGI styling, and bright blue eyes. Cannot speak, communicating through beeps. Transforms into a yellow Earth-style muscle car resembling a Camaro

data.name: Bumblebee (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Bright yellow robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, more expressive face than the Prime design, and bold black accents. Taller and more athletic build. Transforms into a sleek yellow sports car with black racing stripes

data.name: Arcee (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Slim blue and pink Cybertronian robot with angular alien armor and glowing blue optics. Features Cybertronian vehicle styling with no Earth-based alt mode

data.name: Arcee (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Slender blue and pink robot with a sleek angular CGI design, sharp facial features, and glowing blue eyes. Compact and agile frame. Transforms into a blue Kawasaki-style sports motorcycle

data.name: Bulkhead (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Massive green Cybertronian robot with heavy armor plating and thick limbs. Transforms into a Cybertronian armored transport with alien mechanical detailing

data.name: Bulkhead (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Stocky green robot with a barrel-chested build, rounded shoulders, and large hands. Gentle expression despite imposing size. Dark angular CGI design with glowing blue eyes. Transforms into a green armored SUV

data.name: Ratchet (War for Cybertron)
data.description: White and red Cybertronian robot with a medic's cross insignia and angular alien design. Transforms into a Cybertronian medical vehicle with exposed mechanical systems

data.name: Ratchet (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Stocky white and red robot with angular CGI design, grumpy expression, and glowing blue eyes. Broad shoulders and medical tools integrated into forearms. Transforms into a white and red ambulance

data.name: Cliffjumper (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Compact red Cybertronian robot with angular armor and glowing blue optics. Transforms into a sleek red Cybertronian car with alien styling

data.name: Cliffjumper (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Stocky red robot with horns on his head, angular CGI design, and bright blue eyes. Muscular build with silver accents. Transforms into a red muscle car. Killed in the pilot episode

data.name: Wheeljack (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: White robot with green and red accents, angular CGI design, and a faceplate mask. Dual sword-wielding warrior build. Transforms into a white sports car with green and red racing stripes

data.name: Smokescreen (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Sleek blue and yellow robot with racing number 38 markings, angular CGI design, and enthusiastic expression. Athletic build with door-wing panels. Transforms into a blue and yellow sports car

data.name: Ultra Magnus (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Tall, imposing blue robot with red chest and angular CGI design. Stern expression and broad-shouldered commander build. Wields the Forge of Solus Prime as a hammer weapon. Transforms into a blue armored truck with missile launchers

data.name: Megatron (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Massive silver and purple Cybertronian robot with angular alien armor, red optics, and a menacing hunched posture. Arm-mounted fusion cannon. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank with alien mechanical detailing

data.name: Megatron (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Tall silver and dark gray robot with angular CGI design, glowing red eyes, and sharp facial features. Muscular frame with arm-mounted fusion cannon. Dark Energon-infused purple highlights in later seasons. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet

data.name: Starscream (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Lean silver and red Cybertronian jet robot with angular alien seeker design, red optics, and wing panels on back. Transforms into a Cybertronian fighter jet with alien geometry

data.name: Starscream (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Tall, lanky silver and red robot with angular CGI design, high heels, pointed face, and scheming expression. Glowing red eyes and sharp claws. Transforms into an Earth-style F-16 fighter jet

data.name: Soundwave (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Dark blue Cybertronian robot with a featureless visor face and angular alien design. Chest panel deploys Laserbeak. Transforms into a Cybertronian truck with communications equipment

data.name: Soundwave (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Slender dark purple robot with a completely blank visor face that displays audio waveforms. Eerily thin and silent with angular CGI design. Deploys Laserbeak from chest. Transforms into an MQ-9 Reaper surveillance drone

data.name: Knock Out (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Sleek red robot with angular CGI design, vain expression, and polished finish. Compact sports car build with medical tools. Transforms into a red Aston Martin-style sports car

data.name: Breakdown (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Bulky blue Cybertronian robot with heavy armor and angular alien design. Transforms into a Cybertronian armored vehicle

data.name: Breakdown (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Massive blue robot with angular CGI design, single yellow eye (after MECH encounter), and heavy bruiser build. Transforms into a blue armored SUV/truck

data.name: Dreadwing (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Large blue and gold robot with angular CGI design, stern expression, and imposing warrior build. Wing panels folded on back. Transforms into a blue and gold fighter jet

data.name: Skyquake (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Large green robot nearly identical in build to his twin Dreadwing, with angular CGI design and fierce expression. Wing panels on back. Transforms into a green fighter jet

data.name: Airachnid (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Slender black and purple spider-like robot with multiple arachnid legs extending from her back, angular CGI design, and predatory expression. Transforms into a black attack helicopter

data.name: Shockwave (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Purple Cybertronian robot with a single glowing yellow optic, angular alien design, and gun-arm cannon. Logical and menacing posture. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank

data.name: Shockwave (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Massive purple robot with a single glowing yellow optic, angular CGI design, and left arm replaced by a cannon barrel. Imposing and coldly logical posture. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank/cannon

data.name: Predaking (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Massive orange and black robot with draconic features, angular CGI design, and glowing yellow eyes. Imposing warrior build with beast-mode elements visible. Transforms into a mechanical firedrake dragon that breathes fire

data.name: Darksteel (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Dark blue and silver robot with bestial features, angular CGI design, and a brutish build. Transforms into a mechanical ursagryph — a bear-griffin hybrid beast with wings and claws

data.name: Skylynx (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Green and gold robot with draconic features, angular CGI design, and a lean predatory build. Transforms into a winged dragon beast with mechanical detailing

data.name: Hardshell (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Large dark purple and black insectoid robot with mandibles, compound eyes, and heavy angular CGI design. The only individually distinct Insecticon. Transforms into a mechanical horned beetle

data.name: Makeshift (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Gray and dark purple robot with a nondescript angular CGI design, befitting his shape-shifting spy role. Featureless face that can mimic other Transformers

data.name: Laserbeak (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Small dark purple surveillance drone that deploys from Soundwave's chest. Flat, angular CGI design resembling a mechanical bird with red optics and sharp wings

data.name: Jack Darby (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Teenage boy with dark hair, blue eyes, and casual clothing. CGI-rendered human with angular stylization matching the show's aesthetic. Average build, typically wearing a gray T-shirt and jeans

data.name: Miko Nakadai (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Japanese teenage girl with pink-streaked black hair tied in pigtails, angular CGI styling. Energetic posture, wearing a purple top with a graphic print and short skirt

data.name: Rafael Esquivel (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Young boy with curly brown hair, large glasses, and a small frame. CGI-rendered with angular stylization. Typically wearing an orange and white striped shirt and carrying a laptop

data.name: Agent Fowler (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Stocky African-American man in a dark suit and tie, CGI-rendered with angular stylization. Broad-shouldered military bearing with a stern but expressive face

data.name: June Darby (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Dark-haired woman in nurse scrubs or casual clothing, CGI-rendered with angular stylization. Slim build with a caring but worried expression

data.name: Silas (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Tall military man with a scarred face, gray hair, and dark tactical gear. CGI-rendered with angular stylization. Imposing and calculating expression. Later grafted into Breakdown's corpse

data.name: Unicron (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Colossal dark purple and gray entity with angular CGI design, glowing purple eyes, and apocalyptic scale. Rocky, planet-like texture with mechanical detailing. Manifests as a massive humanoid form emerging from Earth's core

data.name: Primus (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Never directly shown in physical form — represented through Cybertron itself and the light of the AllSpark. Referenced as the creator god whose body forms the planet Cybertron

data.name: Alpha Trion (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: Ancient red and blue robot with a long beard-like chin guard, wise expression, and ornate angular CGI design. Elderly, distinguished build befitting one of the original Thirteen Primes

data.name: Tailgate (Transformers: Prime)
data.description: White and blue compact robot with angular CGI design, visible only in flashback sequences. Slim build similar to Arcee's partner scale. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Sentinel Zeta Prime (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Imposing red, gold, and blue Cybertronian robot with regal armor, a crowned helm, and glowing blue optics. Larger than Optimus with ornate detailing befitting the ruling Prime. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Ironhide (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Bulky red Cybertronian robot with heavy armor plating, angular alien design, and glowing blue optics. Arm-mounted weapons and a tough veteran stance. Transforms into a Cybertronian truck

data.name: Sideswipe (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Sleek red Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, glowing blue optics, and a melee-focused build. Transforms into a fast Cybertronian car

data.name: Sideswipe (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Cocky red robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, bright color palette, and expressive face. Lean athletic build with blade weapons. Transforms into a sleek red sports car

data.name: Jetfire (War for Cybertron)
data.description: White and red Cybertronian jet robot with angular alien design, wing panels, and glowing blue optics. Aerial warrior build with thruster packs. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet

data.name: Air Raid (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Red and white Cybertronian jet robot with angular alien design, wing panels on back, and glowing blue optics. Daring aerial warrior build. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet

data.name: Silverbolt (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Silver and blue Cybertronian jet robot with angular alien design, wing panels, and glowing blue optics. Commanding Aerialbot leader build. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet

data.name: Warpath (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Stocky red Cybertronian robot with a chest-mounted cannon, angular alien design, and glowing blue optics. Compact but heavily armed tank warrior build. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank

data.name: Jazz (War for Cybertron)
data.description: White and blue Cybertronian robot with a visor, angular alien design, and glowing blue optics. Agile special-ops build with a grappling hook. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Jazz (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Cool white robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, blue visor, and bright expressive design. Sleek Earth-style build with black accents. Transforms into a white sports car

data.name: Omega Supreme (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Colossal Cybertronian guardian robot towering over all others, with red and gold armor, angular alien design, and glowing blue optics. Massive cannon arm. Transforms into a Cybertronian starship/rocket base

data.name: Metroplex (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Gigantic Autobot city-former, the largest character in the game. Red and gray Cybertronian architecture that transforms into a massive humanoid robot. Integrated into Iacon's city structure with enormous cannons

data.name: Grimlock (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Massive gray and gold Cybertronian robot with heavy angular armor and glowing blue optics. Powerful warrior build with a giant sword and shield. Transforms into a mechanical T-Rex with fire breath, gained through Shockwave's experiments

data.name: Grimlock (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Large green and black robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, expressive face, and bulky comedic build. Friendly but dimwitted demeanor. Transforms into a green T-Rex dinosaur with a bright, toy-friendly color scheme

data.name: Swoop (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Lean gray and red Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, wing panels, and glowing blue optics. Aerial Dinobot build. Transforms into a mechanical pteranodon

data.name: Slug (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Stocky gray Cybertronian robot with heavy angular armor, horns, and glowing blue optics. Hot-headed warrior build with a charging posture. Transforms into a mechanical triceratops

data.name: Snarl (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Gray and gold Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, back-mounted plates, and glowing blue optics. Quiet and solitary warrior build. Transforms into a mechanical stegosaurus

data.name: Barricade (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Dark gray and purple Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, glowing red optics, and a scout build. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Brawl (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Massive green Cybertronian robot with heavy tank armor, angular alien design, and glowing red optics. Hulking weapons specialist build with shoulder-mounted cannons. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank

data.name: Thundercracker (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Blue and silver Cybertronian jet robot with angular alien seeker design, wing panels, and glowing red optics. Nearly identical build to Starscream and Skywarp with distinct blue coloring. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet

data.name: Skywarp (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Black and purple Cybertronian jet robot with angular alien seeker design, wing panels, and glowing red optics. Nearly identical build to Starscream and Thundercracker with dark coloring. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet

data.name: Trypticon (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Colossal dark gray and purple Decepticon weapon, one of the largest enemies in the game. Dinosaur-like Cybertronian form with massive jaws and destructive firepower. Transforms into a Cybertronian space station and eventually becomes the Nemesis warship

data.name: Onslaught (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Dark blue Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, tactical commander build, and glowing red optics. Heavy armor with missile launchers. Transforms into a Cybertronian missile truck

data.name: Blast Off (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Purple and gray Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, wing panels, and glowing red optics. Space warrior build with thruster packs. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet/spacecraft

data.name: Vortex (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Gray and red Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, rotor blades, and glowing red optics. Interrogator build with sharp detailing. Transforms into a Cybertronian helicopter

data.name: Swindle (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Yellow and purple Cybertronian robot with angular alien design and glowing red optics. Compact opportunistic arms-dealer build. Transforms into a Cybertronian armored car

data.name: Bruticus (Fall of Cybertron)
data.description: Massive combined Cybertronian robot formed from all five Combaticons. Towering angular alien design with mismatched limbs from component bots. Glowing red optics and overwhelming destructive presence

data.name: Slipstream (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Purple and teal Cybertronian jet robot with angular alien seeker design, wing panels, and glowing red optics. Female seeker build distinct from the male Seekers. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet

data.name: Scattershot (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Red and white Cybertronian robot with angular alien design, heavy weapons loadout, and glowing blue optics. Aggressive warrior build with oversized cannons. Transforms into a Cybertronian artillery vehicle

data.name: Dead End (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Dark red Cybertronian robot with angular alien design and glowing red optics. Fatalistic posture and sleek car-former build. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Demolishor (War for Cybertron)
data.description: Massive gray Cybertronian robot with heavy angular armor, glowing red optics, and a hulking slow-moving build. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank

data.name: Heatwave (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Red and gray robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design, bright colors, and a friendly but determined expression. Muscular firefighter build with wide shoulders. Transforms into a red fire truck

data.name: Chase (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Blue and white robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a serious, rule-following expression. Police-themed build with a badge emblem. Transforms into a police car

data.name: Blades (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Orange and white robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a nervous but well-meaning expression. Rotor blades visible on back. Transforms into an orange rescue helicopter

data.name: Boulder (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Green and gray robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a curious, gentle expression. Stocky construction-worker build with wide hands. Transforms into a green bulldozer

data.name: Salvage (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Green robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a cheerful expression. Bulky recycling-themed build. Transforms into a green garbage truck

data.name: Blurr (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Blue robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a fast-talking, energetic expression. Sleek racer build with speed lines in the design. Transforms into a blue race car

data.name: High Tide (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Teal and gray robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a grizzled old-timer expression. Large nautical-themed build. Transforms into a rescue ship and can combine with it for Megabot Mode

data.name: Quickshadow (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Purple and silver robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a refined, elegant expression. Sleek feminine build with a British demeanor. Transforms into a luxury sports car with right-hand drive

data.name: Hot Shot (Rescue Bots Academy)
data.description: Yellow and red robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and an eager, enthusiastic expression. Young recruit build. Transforms into a rescue truck with later jet and hovercraft modes via Mul-T-Cog

data.name: Whirl (Rescue Bots Academy)
data.description: Blue and white robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a determined expression. Young female recruit build with helicopter elements. Transforms into a helicopter, later acquires a police car alt mode

data.name: Hoist (Rescue Bots Academy)
data.description: Teal green robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and an inventive expression. Young recruit build with mechanic elements. Transforms into a teal green tow truck

data.name: Medix (Rescue Bots Academy)
data.description: White and red robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a caring expression. Young recruit build with medical cross markings. Transforms into a white ambulance

data.name: Wedge (Rescue Bots Academy)
data.description: Orange robot with a simplified, rounded cartoon design and a hardworking expression. Young recruit build with construction elements. Transforms into an orange payloader construction vehicle

data.name: Chief Charlie Burns (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Middle-aged man with gray hair and a mustache, wearing a police chief uniform. Simplified cartoon design with bright primary colors and a warm, authoritative expression

data.name: Kade Burns (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Young man with red hair wearing a firefighter uniform. Simplified cartoon design with a cocky, overconfident expression and athletic build

data.name: Dani Burns (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Young woman with brown hair wearing a pilot flight suit. Simplified cartoon design with a brave, capable expression and a helicopter pilot helmet

data.name: Graham Burns (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Young man with brown hair wearing casual clothing with engineering tools. Simplified cartoon design with a studious, thoughtful expression and glasses

data.name: Cody Burns (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Young boy with blond hair wearing casual clothing. Simplified cartoon design with an eager, friendly expression. The youngest Burns child who serves as liaison between the Rescue Bots and humans

data.name: Doc Greene (Rescue Bots)
data.description: Middle-aged African-American man with a lab coat, goggles on his head, and wild hair. Simplified cartoon design with an enthusiastic, eccentric scientist expression

data.name: Strongarm (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Blue and white robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, determined expression, and police-themed detailing. Athletic build with law enforcement insignia. Transforms into a blue police SUV

data.name: Fixit (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Small orange and gray Mini-Con robot with a cel-shaded design, wheel-based locomotion instead of legs, and a glitchy but helpful expression. Compact technician build with tools. Transforms into a Cybertronian drill sled

data.name: Drift (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Black and orange samurai-themed robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, stoic expression, and ornate armor. Carries twin swords and has a disciplined martial arts posture. Transforms into a futuristic sports car

data.name: Jetstorm (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Small blue Mini-Con robot with a cel-shaded design and a disciplined student expression. Deploys from Drift in combat. Transforms into a buzzsaw disc

data.name: Slipstream Mini-Con (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Small orange Mini-Con robot with a cel-shaded design and a dutiful student expression. Deploys from Drift in combat alongside Jetstorm. Transforms into a buzzsaw disc

data.name: Windblade (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Red and black robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, kabuki-style facial markings, and fan-blade wings. Sleek feminine build with wind-themed powers. Transforms into a VTOL jet

data.name: Denny Clay (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Middle-aged man with brown hair and a goatee, wearing casual clothing. Cel-shaded anime-influenced human design with an easygoing, collector personality. Runs the scrapyard base

data.name: Russell Clay (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Young boy with brown hair wearing casual clothing. Cel-shaded anime-influenced human design with a curious, helpful expression. Son of Denny who befriends the Autobots

data.name: Steeljaw (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Blue and gray wolf-like robot with a cel-shaded anime-influenced look, sharp fangs, pointed ears, and a cunning expression. Muscular predatory build with claw weapons. Transforms into a blue off-road vehicle

data.name: Underbite (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Bulky blue and gray robot with a massive lower jaw, cel-shaded design, and a ravenous expression. Chompazoid build designed for consuming metal. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank car

data.name: Thunderhoof (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Brown and gray moose-like robot with large antlers, cel-shaded design, and a mobster-like demeanor. Stocky crime boss build. Transforms into a tractor

data.name: Fracture (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Purple and black robot with a cel-shaded design, smug expression, and bounty hunter gear. Sleek motorcycle-former build with angular armor. Transforms into a chopper motorcycle

data.name: Clampdown (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Red and brown crustacean-like robot with claw hands, cel-shaded design, and a paranoid, cowardly expression. Unusual organic-styled build. Transforms into a wood-paneled hatchback car

data.name: Overload (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Massive gray and purple robot with a cel-shaded design and an overwhelming brute-force build. Heavy tank armor with angular detailing. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank

data.name: Glowstrike (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Red and black insect-like robot with ladybug wing panels, cel-shaded design, and a cold, commanding expression. Energy-bolt emitting palms and bioluminescent accents. Transforms into a ladybug beast mode

data.name: Scorponok (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Large orange and black scorpion-themed robot with articulated claws, stinger tail, cel-shaded design, and a menacing expression. Heavy beast-mode build. Transforms into a scorpion

data.name: Saberhorn (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Brown and gold beetle-themed robot with horn protrusions, cel-shaded design, and a refined swordfighter's expression. Gentleman duelist build with dual swords. Transforms into a winged rhinoceros beetle

data.name: Ultra Bee (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Massive combined robot formed from Bumblebee, Sideswipe, Strongarm, and Grimlock with Drift as a sword. Cel-shaded design with yellow dominant coloring and mismatched component limbs. Tower over individual characters

data.name: Menasor (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Massive combined Decepticon robot formed from five Stunticons. Cel-shaded design with dark coloring and mismatched component limbs. Intimidating but hindered by clashing component personalities

data.name: Motormaster (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Dark gray and purple robot with a cel-shaded design and a domineering, aggressive expression. Heavy Stunticon leader build who forms the torso of Menasor

data.name: Heatseeker (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Red and black robot with a cel-shaded design. Stunticon who forms the left leg of Menasor

data.name: Wildbreak (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Blue and silver robot with a cel-shaded design. Stunticon who forms the left arm of Menasor

data.name: Dragstrip (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Yellow and black robot with a cel-shaded design. Stunticon who forms the right arm of Menasor

data.name: Slashmark (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Dark gray robot with a cel-shaded design. Stunticon who forms the right leg of Menasor

data.name: Galvatronus (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Massive combined robot formed from five corrupt council members. Cel-shaded design with purple and dark coloring. Powerful combined form with Cyclonus as the dominant torso personality

data.name: Cyclonus (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Purple and dark blue robot with a cel-shaded design, horned helmet, and a scheming, authoritative expression. Forms the torso of Galvatronus. Corrupt Autobot Council member secretly serving Decepticon interests

data.name: Cyberwarp (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Black and teal robot with a cel-shaded design. Corrupt council member who forms an arm of Galvatronus. Space-fighter scout build

data.name: Skyjack (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Gray and red robot with a cel-shaded design. Corrupt council member who forms an arm of Galvatronus. Space-fighter scout build

data.name: Treadshock (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Green and dark gray robot with a cel-shaded design. Corrupt council member who forms a leg of Galvatronus. Ground-vehicle scout build

data.name: Riotgear (Robots in Disguise 2015)
data.description: Dark blue and gray robot with a cel-shaded design. Corrupt council member who forms a leg of Galvatronus. Ground-vehicle scout build
